zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Hankford於大約1370年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir William Hankford22歲，母親Christina37歲。他於1396年之前與Thomasine Stapledon在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年4月27日在英國享年50歲，埋葬在英國戴文蒙可利。

英国英格兰戴文安納利 豪斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Hankford于大约1370年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir William Hankford22岁，母亲Christina37岁。他于1396年之前与Thomasine Stapledon在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年4月27日在英国享年50岁，埋葬在英国戴文蒙可利。

nameMeanings.name: Hankford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Hackforth (North Yorkshire) or Hackford (Norfolk). The former is named with Old English haca ‘hook’ + ford ‘ford’, meaning ‘ford at the bend’. The latter likely has the same etymology, or may contain the Old English personal name Haca.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hankford was born about 1370, in Devon, England, his father, Sir William Hankford, was 22 and his mother, Christina, was 37. He married Thomasine Stapledon before 1396, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 27 April 1419, in England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Monkleigh, Devon, England.

Il est décédé le 27 avril 1419, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Monkleigh, Devon, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Hankfordが約1370年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir William Hankfordは22歳，母Christinaは37歳であった。1396年以前にイギリスでThomasine Stapledonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年4月27日にイギリスで50歳で死去し，イギリスデボンモンクレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hankford(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Hankford(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1396년 이전 영국에서 Thomasine Stapledon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 4월 27일 영국에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 몬클리에 묻혔다.
